name_cn:
Premium
🔥🔥Black
Fendi First Small Handbag
Pink Leather Bag
More Details
Fendi First Small Handbag, made of soft pink Nappa leather, with a large metal F closure fixed on the matching Nappa leather. The interior features a signature FF pattern fabric lining, with a removable inner hook and gold metal hardware. Comes with a removable shoulder strap, suitable for hand or shoulder carry.
Made in Italy
Material: Exterior: Sheepskin, Lining: Fabric
Depth: 9.5
Length: 26
Height: 18
Style No.: 2218
